title: Supply Chain Manager - DHL India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DHL India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
